race.comment: Big field and the majority of the better chances drawn wide. Sticking with MATERIALIST (11) who has been freshened since winning on the Sunshine Coast last time. Having first run for the new yard but the latest figure is more than good enough for this line-up. Will need a little luck from the gate but has the ability to measure up to this. Former Sydney galloper MIND OVER MATTER (13) is flying for the new yard and looks the main threat and hot favourite. Has won both runs this time in, sitting just off pace both times to score by a space fresh then again with ease latest. Another step up here but an awful gate to overcome. Hard to knock though and with even luck in running can make it three straight this area. BAGGAGE HANDLER (5) was having first run for new yard last time and was safely held on  heavy track. Much better than that. COLOURS OF AUTUMN (10) was super consistent last time in and best figures stack up. PRO FORMA (8) has won both starts this trip and resumes.
